welcome.subtitle: Tap anywhere to begin
welcome.subhead: BioVoice turns the way you speak into a unique biometric fingerprint — and tells real humans apart from AI deepfakes in under two seconds.
welcome.micLive: Live · the orb breathes with the room
welcome.micDenied: Permission denied · running on synthesized audio
welcome.micSynth: Synthesized audio · grant mic to feel it react

verify.title: Verify identity
verify.rejected: Speaker did not match the enrolled profile
verify.deepfake: Audio flagged as synthetic. Access denied
verify.acceptedSubhead: Your voice matched the stored profile, and the audio was confirmed as a real human speaker — not synthetic.
verify.rejectedSubhead: The captured voice did not match the stored profile, or the audio appeared to be synthetic.
verify.voiceMatchPass: The voice fingerprint matches what we stored at enrollment.
verify.voiceMatchFail: The fingerprints diverge beyond the safe threshold.
verify.authenticityPass: Spectro-temporal patterns are consistent with genuine human speech.
verify.authenticityFail: Synthetic artefacts detected — likely AI-generated audio.

enroll.title: Enrol new user
enroll.subhead: Speak any sentence for a few seconds. We'll capture the timbre, pitch and rhythm that make your voice unmistakably yours — and store it as a 192-number fingerprint.

processing.subhead: One model — ReDimNet-B5 — extracts your voice fingerprint. Another — AASIST — looks for the tell-tale artefacts of synthetic audio. Both finish in milliseconds.

deepfake.subheadFlagged: AASIST found unnatural spectro-temporal patterns — the kind only present in AI-generated audio. The voice was a clone, not the real person.
deepfake.subheadAnalyzing: AASIST examines micro-patterns in pitch, harmonic stability and temporal flow that real vocal cords leave behind. No two are quite the same.

errors.noSpeech: No speech detected. Check that your microphone is on and you spoke during the capture.
errors.rateLimited: Too many failed attempts. Try again in {{seconds}} s.
errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.
